creator: meta@club.kyutech.ac.jp
text:
port japanese/roundcube is broken.

[meta@glory /usr/ports/japanese/roundcube]$ sudo make install 
===>  ja-roundcube-0.4.b,1 is marked as broken: bad distinfo.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/japanese/roundcube.

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/japanese/roundcube && make install
